title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: Google Cloud Tech explains how to build AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Looker, integrating them with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and MCP Toolbox for Databases. The video covers MCP setup, securing Looker API credentials, Python environment configuration, and creating agents that translate prompts into data queries.
writeup: This video walks through building AI-powered agents with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Looker, connecting them via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and the MCP Toolbox for Databases. It covers MCP setup, securing Looker API credentials, configuring a Python environment, and creating agents that translate natural language prompts into data queries. The result is a configuration that bridges agentic tool use and Looker's data layer, with MCP serving as the integration standard.
